stereotype: «Engine» — pure deterministic computation; ServicePricing Strategy host; imports no Temporal
volatility: ServicePricing volatility: how aiarch prices its own service (construction tokens + hosting) to the user. Charge-only / one-directional. No revenue-share, no payout/shortfall netting (those left with the reversed merchant-of-record model).

inbound.name: billingManager
inbound.how: plain deterministic Go function call, direct from workflow code (no Activity wrapper)

inbound.name: projectDesignManager
inbound.how: plain deterministic Go function call, direct from workflow code (no Activity wrapper)

ops.note: UC5 period-close: returns the non-negative service-invoice amount aiarch charges the user for the period (tokens + hosting under ServicePricing). Zero amount is valid (zero usage / fully free-tier) — Manager issues no charge. Never returns a negative amount (charge-only). Manager reads usage from usageAccess and servicePricing from billingStateAccess and passes both by value.

fields.name: ConstructionTokens
fields.note: Σ construction-token consumption over the period

fields.name: Kind
fields.note: FlatMarkup | TieredFloors | FreeTierSubsidy | FinOpsAttribution | VolumeDiscount | PerFeatureCost — Strategy discriminator

fields.name: ServiceInvoiceAmount
fields.note: non-negative; zero valid (zero usage / fully free-tier)

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: ContractMisuse | UnknownPricing | InternalInvariant — all programmer errors; no retryable flag

ops.note: UC2 commit-time: returns the service-cost projection ({tokenCostEstimate, hostingRate}) the Manager binds to the committed option for the SDP confirmation row. Takes only option (carries ServicePricing by value per FU-OE-A). Not an actual invoiced amount — no metered usage at commit time.

fields.name: Pricing
fields.note: the customer's service-pricing policy carried on the option (FU-OE-A — sanctioned carrier)

fields.name: TokenCostEstimate
fields.note: what aiarch's token pricing implies for this option's build

fields.name: HostingRate
fields.note: struct{PerComputeUnitSecond Money; PerStorageByteMonth Money; PerEgressByte Money; Currency string} — per-unit rate, not a projected amount

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: ContractMisuse | UnknownPricing | InternalInvariant — all programmer errors; no retryable flag

dataContracts: PeriodUsage struct { CustomerID; PeriodID; ConstructionTokens int64; ComputeUnitSeconds float64; StorageBytesMonths float64; EgressBytes float64; Currency string }
ServicePricing struct { Kind ServicePricingKind; /* regime-specific parameters */ }  // Strategy discriminator; package-internal Strategy registration
ProjectOption struct { OptionID; Pricing ServicePricing; /* other option fields */ }
ServiceInvoice struct { ServiceInvoiceAmount Money; TokenCharge Money; HostingCharge Money }
ServiceCostProjection struct { TokenCostEstimate Money; HostingRate HostingRate }
HostingRate struct { PerComputeUnitSecond Money; PerStorageByteMonth Money; PerEgressByte Money; Currency string }
Money struct { MinorUnits int64; Currency string }  // canonical location: framework-go (no float money)
errorModel: framework-go/engine.Error with kinds: ContractMisuse (nil/invalid inputs; structurally-invalid input such as negative token count or mismatched currencies — a Manager bug) / UnknownPricing (servicePricing references a Strategy with no compiled-in registration — a deploy/config bug; no silent fallback, mirrors operationEstimationEngine's UnknownInfrastructure) / InternalInvariant (engine-internal invariant violation, e.g. negative serviceInvoiceAmount — forbidden for a charge-only Engine; panics in test builds). No retryable flag; no Temporal mapping. All errors are programmer errors — not 'no invoice possible' outcomes.
idempotency: Trivially idempotent. Pure functions: identical inputs always produce identical outputs. No side effects to deduplicate; no idempotencyKey parameter. The charge is deduped by the Manager's billingGatewayAccess.chargeUser gateway-native idempotency; the invoice record by billingStateAccess.recordServiceInvoice — both in the Manager, not here.

revisions.summary: Re-cut from the deleted settlementEngine (D-SG) after 2026-06-09 merchant-of-record reversal. Two ops named verbatim from DSL edge labels. Charge-only / one-directional (no signedNet, no routingDirective, no recomputeNet). App C §6 8/9 PASS + 1 WAIVED (2b, low count justified). All 6 OQs addressed.

APPROVE-AND-FREEZE. App C §6 8/9 PASS + 1 WAIVED (2b) independently reproduced. All 6 OQs ruled. One mayAmend amendment applied: HostingRate gains PerEgressByte field (PeriodUsage meters EgressBytes as a hosting component; the SDP row must surface the rate for that dimension). C-BE construction unblocked.
